NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT AWADALLA AWADALLA'S Motion For Order Setting Aside Judgment IS DENIED. Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
